pocetna.hero1.tekst: For over three decades we have been dedicated to providing the best service to all our partners.
pocetna.hero2.tekst: A wide range of colors and dimensions of PVC pipes for every type of installation.
pocetna.hero3.tekst: Products ready for delivery from our own warehouse in Inđija.
pocetna.konama.podnaslov: A brief introduction to our work, vision and experience in PVC manufacturing.
pocetna.konama.tekst: ProPVC proizvodnja is a family-owned company from Inđija that has spent many years processing and selling polyvinyl chloride (PVC) and other industrial plastic materials. Our goal is to offer every partner a quality product, fast delivery and expert advice when choosing the right material for a specific purpose.
pocetna.proizvodi.podnaslov: A selection of the products our partners request most often.
pocetna.kartica_cevi.opis: Resistant to chemicals and weather conditions, for water supply and industrial installations.
pocetna.kartica_profili.opis: Precisely cut profiles for the construction and carpentry industry.
pocetna.kartica_ploce.opis: Ideal for making advertising panels, fences and interior fittings.
proizvodi.podnaslov: A wide range of industrial plastics for construction, engineering and everyday use.
proizvodi.cevi.opis: Water supply, sewage and industrial pipes of various diameters, resistant to corrosion.
proizvodi.profili.opis: Profiles for carpentry, construction joints and interior extensions of buildings.
proizvodi.ploce.opis: Solid and corrugated sheets for advertising panels, partitions and protective covers.
proizvodi.fitinzi.opis: Elbows, T-joints and connectors for quick and safe pipeline assembly.
proizvodi.poliamid.opis: High-strength technical polymers for manufacturing machine parts and gears.
proizvodi.teflon.opis: Material resistant to high temperatures and chemicals, for special applications.
proizvodi.pppe.opis: Lightweight and flexible materials for packaging, tanks and the chemical industry.
proizvodi.peekpet.opis: High-performance polymers for demanding industrial and food-grade applications.
proizvodi.video.podnaslov: Watch a presentation of our products in real-world use.
proizvodi.zakljucak: Technical documentation and expert advice from our sales representatives are available for all products in our range. Feel free to contact us for a detailed quote and pricing.
onama.podnaslov: Our journey from a small workshop to a reliable partner in plastics processing.
onama.pasus1: ProPVC proizvodnja was founded in Inđija with the idea of offering local and regional partners quality PVC material without long waits for imports. Over the years, we have expanded our range from basic PVC pipes to a wide spectrum of technical polymers, following the needs of the construction, engineering and food industries.
onama.pasus2: Our team consists of experienced technologists and sales representatives who approach every partner individually - from choosing the right material, through processing, to delivery to the address. We strive to make sure every order is completed precisely and on time.
onama.pasus3: We believe that a long-term partnership is built on trust and quality, which is why we invest in equipment, staff training and quality control at every step of production.
onama.video.podnaslov: A short video about the production process and the ProPVC team.
